content: لَو الأتوبيس مَشي مِن غيرِك، هَتِعمِل إيه وَقتَها
translations: eng:if the bus leaves without you, what are you going to do then﹖

transcriptions.arabizi: law il'utoobees mashi min gheer|ak, hatiAmil 'ieeh wa'taha
